name_en: 🎉Latest counter arrival glossy underarm bag Large 1BC156🎉🎉 This exquisite Prada Cleo shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's iconic retro design. Adjustable leather handle + metal hardware🎉🎉 Front enamel triangle metal logo + magnetic closure, Prada logo nylon lining. Size: 30x18.5x4CM!
